#!/bin/bash
# Hook: End of Turn Check - Validates clean state before session ends
# Purpose: Ensure codebase is production-ready before stopping
# Exit 0 = OK, Exit 1 = Block (would need user confirmation)

PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"
cd "$PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0

WARNINGS=0
ERRORS=0

echo ""
echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ"
echo "рҹ”Қ END OF TURN CHECK"
echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ"

# Check 1: Uncommitted changes
if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  UNCOMMITTED=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
  if [ "$UNCOMMITTED" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "вҡ пёҸ  WARNING: $UNCOMMITTED uncommitted file(s)"
    git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -5 | sed 's/^/   /'
    if [ "$UNCOMMITTED" -gt 5 ]; then
      echo "   ... and $((UNCOMMITTED - 5)) more"
    fi
    WARNINGS=$((WARNINGS + 1))
  else
    echo "вң… Git: Working tree clean"
  fi
fi

# Check 2: TypeScript errors (if tsconfig exists)
if [ -f "tsconfig.json" ]; then
  if command -v bun &> /dev/null; then
    TSC_OUTPUT=$(bun run typecheck 2>&1) || true
    TSC_ERRORS=$(echo "$TSC_OUTPUT" | grep -c "error TS" || echo "0")
    if [ "$TSC_ERRORS" -gt 0 ]; then
      echo "вқҢ ERROR: $TSC_ERRORS TypeScript error(s)"
      ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
    else
      echo "вң… TypeScript: No errors"
    fi
  fi
fi

# Check 3: claude-progress.txt was updated (informational)
if [ -f "claude-progress.txt" ]; then
  MODIFIED=$(git status --porcelain claude-progress.txt 2>/dev/null | grep -c "M " || echo "0")
  if [ "$MODIFIED" -eq 0 ]; then
    LAST_MOD=$(stat -f "%Sm" -t "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" claude-progress.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
    echo "вҡ пёҸ  REMINDER: claude-progress.txt not modified (last: $LAST_MOD)"
    echo "   Consider updating with session summary before stopping"
    WARNINGS=$((WARNINGS + 1))
  else
    echo "вң… Progress: claude-progress.txt updated this session"
  fi
else
  echo "вҡ пёҸ  WARNING: claude-progress.txt not found"
  WARNINGS=$((WARNINGS + 1))
fi

# Check 4: features.json exists
if [ -f "features.json" ]; then
  PASSED=$(jq '.summary.passed // 0' features.json 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  TOTAL=$(jq '.summary.total // 0' features.json 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  echo "рҹ“Ҡ Features: $PASSED/$TOTAL passed"
else
  echo "вҡ пёҸ  WARNING: features.json not found"
  WARNINGS=$((WARNINGS + 1))
fi

# Summary
echo ""
echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ"
if [ "$ERRORS" -gt 0 ]; then
  echo "вқҢ CHECK FAILED: $ERRORS error(s), $WARNINGS warning(s)"
  echo "   Fix errors before ending session"
elif [ "$WARNINGS" -gt 0 ]; then
  echo "вҡ пёҸ  CHECK PASSED with $WARNINGS warning(s)"
  echo "   Consider addressing warnings before stopping"
else
  echo "вң… ALL CHECKS PASSED"
  echo "   Codebase is production-ready"
fi
echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ"

# Always exit 0 (informational only, don't block)
exit 0

1вҶ’#!/bin/bash
     2вҶ’# BMAD v6 Enforcement Hook - UserPromptSubmit
     3вҶ’# Ensures all requests follow proper BMAD workflow protocol
     4вҶ’# Enhanced: 2025-12-28 - Full lifecycle enforcement
     5вҶ’
     6вҶ’# Read user prompt from stdin
     7вҶ’USER_PROMPT=$(cat)
     8вҶ’
     9вҶ’# Keywords that indicate implementation requests
    10вҶ’IMPL_KEYWORDS="implement|create|add|fix|build|develop|code|write|make|update|change|modify|refactor|edit"
    11вҶ’
    12вҶ’# Keywords that indicate proper BMAD workflow usage
    13вҶ’BMAD_KEYWORDS="workflow|dev-story|create-tech-spec|code-review|testarch|sprint|bmad|retrospective|create-story"
    14вҶ’
    15вҶ’# Keywords for compliance/status checks
    16вҶ’STATUS_KEYWORDS="status|compliance|check|verify|validate"
    17вҶ’
    18вҶ’# Check if this is a status/compliance check (always allow)
    19вҶ’if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "$STATUS_KEYWORDS" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    20вҶ’    exit 0
    21вҶ’fi
    22вҶ’
    23вҶ’# Check if this looks like an implementation request
    24вҶ’if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "$IMPL_KEYWORDS" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    25вҶ’    # Check if user is already using BMAD workflows
    26вҶ’    if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "$BMAD_KEYWORDS" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    27вҶ’        # User is using BMAD workflows - allow
    28вҶ’        exit 0
    29вҶ’    fi
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’    # Implementation request without BMAD workflow reference
    32вҶ’    # BLOCKING ENFORCEMENT: Output message and EXIT 1
    33вҶ’    cat << 'EOF'
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
    36вҶ’вӣ” BMAD v6 ENFORCEMENT - BLOCKED: Implementation without workflow
    37вҶ’в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
    38вҶ’
    39вҶ’Your request was BLOCKED because it appears to be an implementation
    40вҶ’request without using a BMAD workflow.
    41вҶ’
    42вҶ’TO PROCEED, you must use one of these workflows:
    43вҶ’

#!/bin/bash
# BMAD v6 Enforcement Hook - UserPromptSubmit
# Ensures all requests follow proper BMAD workflow protocol
# Enhanced: 2025-12-28 - Full lifecycle enforcement

# Read user prompt from stdin
USER_PROMPT=$(cat)

# Keywords that indicate implementation requests
IMPL_KEYWORDS="implement|create|add|fix|build|develop|code|write|make|update|change|modify|refactor|edit"

# Keywords that indicate proper BMAD workflow usage
BMAD_KEYWORDS="workflow|dev-story|create-tech-spec|code-review|testarch|sprint|bmad|retrospective|create-story"

# Keywords for compliance/status checks
STATUS_KEYWORDS="status|compliance|check|verify|validate"

# Check if this is a status/compliance check (always allow)
if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "$STATUS_KEYWORDS" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    exit 0
fi

# Check if this looks like an implementation request
if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "$IMPL_KEYWORDS" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    # Check if user is already using BMAD workflows
    if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "$BMAD_KEYWORDS" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        # User is using BMAD workflows - allow
        exit 0
    fi

    # Implementation request without BMAD workflow reference
    # BLOCKING ENFORCEMENT: Output message and EXIT 1
    cat << 'EOF'

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

#!/bin/bash
# Hook: PreToolUse (Write|Edit)
# Purpose: BLOCK manual edits to dependencies/devDependencies in package.json
# Exit 2 = BLOCK, Exit 0 = ALLOW

FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null)
OLD_STRING=$(jq -r '.tool_input.old_string // empty' 2>/dev/null)
NEW_STRING=$(jq -r '.tool_input.new_string // empty' 2>/dev/null)
CONTENT=$(jq -r '.tool_input.content // empty' 2>/dev/null)

# Only check package.json files
if [[ "$FILE_PATH" != *"package.json"* ]]; then
  exit 0
fi

# For Edit tool: check if editing dependencies or devDependencies
if [[ -n "$OLD_STRING" ]]; then
  # Check if the edit touches dependencies or devDependencies
  if [[ "$OLD_STRING" == *'"dependencies"'* ]] || \
     [[ "$OLD_STRING" == *'"devDependencies"'* ]] || \
     [[ "$NEW_STRING" == *'"dependencies"'* ]] || \
     [[ "$NEW_STRING" == *'"devDependencies"'* ]]; then
    echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ" >&2
    echo "рҹҡ« BLOCKED: Manual edit to dependencies in package.json" >&2
    echo "" >&2
    echo "Use 'bun add <package>' instead of editing manually." >&2
    echo "Package managers resolve versions and peer dependencies." >&2
    echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ" >&2
    exit 2
  fi
  # Allow edits to scripts, name, version, peerDependencies, etc.
  exit 0
fi

# For Write tool: check if writing dependencies or devDependencies
if [[ -n "$CONTENT" ]]; then
  # Check if the content contains dependencies being added
  if [[ "$CONTENT" == *'"dependencies"'* ]] || \
     [[ "$CONTENT" == *'"devDependencies"'* ]]; then
    echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ" >&2
    echo "рҹҡ« BLOCKED: Manual write to package.json with dependencies" >&2
    echo "" >&2
    echo "Use 'bun add <package>' instead of editing manually." >&2
    echo "Package managers resolve versions and peer dependencies." >&2
    echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ" >&2
    exit 2
  fi
fi

exit 0

#!/bin/bash
# Hook: Stop (Quality Gate)
# Purpose: End-of-turn validation
# Exit 2 = BLOCK continuation, Exit 0 = Allow

PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"
cd "$PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0

echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ"
echo "рҹ”Қ END-OF-TURN QUALITY CHECK"
echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ"

# 1. TypeScript check
TS_CHANGED=false
if git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then
  TS_CHANGED=true
fi
if git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then
  TS_CHANGED=true
fi

if [ "$TS_CHANGED" = true ]; then
  if [ -f "package.json" ] && grep -q '"typecheck"' package.json 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "рҹ“қ TypeScript files changed - running typecheck..."
    if ! bun run typecheck 2>&1 | head -20; then
      echo "" >&2
      echo "вқҢ TYPECHECK FAILED" >&2
      echo "Fix TypeScript errors before continuing." >&2
      exit 2
    fi
    echo "вң… Typecheck passed"
  fi
fi

# 2. Rust check
RS_CHANGED=false
if git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then
  RS_CHANGED=true
fi
if git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then
  RS_CHANGED=true
fi

if [ "$RS_CHANGED" = true ]; then
  if [ -f "src-tauri/Cargo.toml" ]; then
    echo "рҹҰҖ Rust files changed - running cargo check..."
    if ! (cd src-tauri && cargo check 2>&1 | head -20); then
      echo "" >&2
      echo "вқҢ CARGO CHECK FAILED" >&2
      echo "Fix Rust errors before continuing." >&2
      exit 2
    fi
    echo "вң… Cargo check passed"
  fi
fi

# 3. Harness file validation
if [ ! -f ".harness/features.json" ]; then
  echo "вҡ пёҸ  .harness/features.json not found" >&2
fi

if [ ! -f ".harness/progress.txt" ]; then
  echo "вҡ пёҸ  .harness/progress.txt not found - update progress log" >&2
fi

echo ""
echo "вң… End-of-turn check complete"
exit 0

#!/bin/bash
# Hook: PreToolUse (Write|Edit)
# Purpose: BLOCK manual edits to dependencies in package.json or Cargo.toml
# Exit 2 = BLOCK, Exit 0 = ALLOW

FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null)
OLD_STRING=$(jq -r '.tool_input.old_string // empty' 2>/dev/null)
NEW_STRING=$(jq -r '.tool_input.new_string // empty' 2>/dev/null)
CONTENT=$(jq -r '.tool_input.content // empty' 2>/dev/null)

# Check package.json
if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *"package.json"* ]]; then
  if [[ "$OLD_STRING" == *'"dependencies"'* ]] || \
     [[ "$OLD_STRING" == *'"devDependencies"'* ]] || \
     [[ "$NEW_STRING" == *'"dependencies"'* ]] || \
     [[ "$NEW_STRING" == *'"devDependencies"'* ]] || \
     [[ "$CONTENT" == *'"dependencies"'* ]] || \
     [[ "$CONTENT" == *'"devDependencies"'* ]]; then
    echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ" >&2
    echo "рҹҡ« BLOCKED: Manual edit to dependencies in package.json" >&2
    echo "" >&2
    echo "Use 'bun add <package>' instead of editing manually." >&2
    echo "Package managers resolve versions and peer dependencies." >&2
    echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ" >&2
    exit 2
  fi
fi

# Check Cargo.toml
if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *"Cargo.toml"* ]]; then
  if [[ "$OLD_STRING" == *"[dependencies]"* ]] || \
     [[ "$NEW_STRING" == *"[dependencies]"* ]] || \
     [[ "$CONTENT" == *"[dependencies]"* ]]; then
    echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ" >&2
    echo "рҹҡ« BLOCKED: Manual edit to dependencies in Cargo.toml" >&2
    echo "" >&2
    echo "Use 'cargo add <crate>' instead of editing manually." >&2
    echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ" >&2

#!/bin/bash
# Hook: UserPromptSubmit - Harness Protocol Enforcement
# Purpose: Remind about harness workflow and visual testing requirements
# Exit 0 = Allow (informational), Exit 1 = Block (hard enforcement)

# Read user prompt from stdin
USER_PROMPT=$(cat)

PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"

# Keywords indicating implementation requests
IMPL_KEYWORDS="implement|create|add|fix|build|develop|code|write|make|update|change|modify|refactor|edit"

# Keywords indicating harness awareness
HARNESS_KEYWORDS="harness|progress\.txt|features\.json|passes|feature"

# Keywords indicating completion claims
COMPLETE_KEYWORDS="complete|done|finished|ready|working|implemented|fixed"

# Keywords for UI/visual work
UI_KEYWORDS="feature|ui|component|page|screen|view|layout|render|display"

# Status/research keywords (always allow without blocking)
STATUS_KEYWORDS="status|check|verify|validate|read|understand|explore|research|search|find"

# Check if this is a status/research request (always allow)
if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "$STATUS_KEYWORDS" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    exit 0
fi

# Check if user claims completion of UI work
if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "$COMPLETE_KEYWORDS" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "$UI_KEYWORDS" > /dev/null 2>&1; then

USER_PROMPT=$(cat)

PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"

# Keywords indicating implementation requests
IMPL_KEYWORDS="implement|create|add|fix|build|develop|code|write|make|update|change|modify|refactor|edit"

# Keywords indicating harness awareness
HARNESS_KEYWORDS="harness|progress\.txt|features\.json|passes|feature"

COMPLETE_KEYWORDS="complete|done|finished|ready|working|implemented|fixed"

UI_KEYWORDS="feature|ui|component|page|screen|view|layout|render|display"

STATUS_KEYWORDS="status|check|verify|validate|read|understand|explore|research|search|find"

# 3. Harness file validation
WARNINGS=0

if [ ! -f ".harness/features.json" ]; then
  echo "вҡ пёҸ  .harness/features.json not found" >&2
  WARNINGS=$((WARNINGS + 1))
else
  TOTAL=$(jq 'length' .harness/features.json 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  PASSED=$(jq '[.[] | select(.passes == true)] | length' .harness/features.json 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  echo "рҹ“Ҡ Features: $PASSED/$TOTAL passed"
fi

# Check if progress.txt was modified this session
if [ -f ".harness/progress.txt" ]; then
  MODIFIED=$(git status --porcelain .harness/progress.txt 2>/dev/null | grep -c "M " || echo "0")
  if [ "$MODIFIED" -eq 0 ]; then
    LAST_MOD=$(stat -f "%Sm" -t "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" .harness/progress.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
    echo "вҡ пёҸ  REMINDER: progress.txt not modified (last: $LAST_MOD)" >&2
    echo "   Consider updating with session summary before stopping" >&2
    WARNINGS=$((WARNINGS + 1))
  else
    echo "вң… Progress: .harness/progress.txt updated this session"
  fi
else
  echo "вҡ пёҸ  .harness/progress.txt not found - update progress log" >&2
  WARNINGS=$((WARNINGS + 1))
fi

#!/bin/bash
# Hook: Stop (Quality Gate)
# Purpose: End-of-turn validation
# Exit 2 = BLOCK continuation, Exit 0 = Allow

PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"
cd "$PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0

echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ"
echo "рҹ”Қ END-OF-TURN QUALITY CHECK"
echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ"

# 1. TypeScript check
TS_CHANGED=false
if git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then
  TS_CHANGED=true
fi
if git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then
  TS_CHANGED=true
fi

if [ "$TS_CHANGED" = true ]; then
  if [ -f "package.json" ] && grep -q '"typecheck"' package.json 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "рҹ“қ TypeScript files changed - running typecheck..."
    if ! bun run typecheck 2>&1 | head -20; then
      echo "" >&2
      echo "вқҢ TYPECHECK FAILED" >&2
      echo "Fix TypeScript errors before continuing." >&2
      exit 2
    fi
    echo "вң… Typecheck passed"
  fi
fi

# 2. Rust check
RS_CHANGED=false
if git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then
  RS_CHANGED=true
fi
if git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then
  RS_CHANGED=true
fi

if [ "$RS_CHANGED" = true ]; then
  if [ -f "src-tauri/Cargo.toml" ]; then
    echo "рҹҰҖ Rust files changed - running cargo check..."
    if ! (cd src-tauri && cargo check 2>&1 | head -20); then
      echo "" >&2
      echo "вқҢ CARGO CHECK FAILED" >&2
      echo "Fix Rust errors before continuing." >&2
      exit 2
    fi
    echo "вң… Cargo check passed"
  fi
fi

# 3. Harness file validation
if [ ! -f ".harness/features.json" ]; then
  echo "вҡ пёҸ  .harness/features.json not found" >&2
fi

if [ ! -f ".harness/progress.txt" ]; then
  echo "вҡ пёҸ  .harness/progress.txt not found - update progress log" >&2
fi

echo ""
echo "вң… End-of-turn check complete"
exit 0

+    echo "   Consider updating with session summary before stopping" >&2

#!/bin/bash
# Hook: Stop (Quality Gate)
# Purpose: End-of-turn validation
# Exit 2 = BLOCK continuation, Exit 0 = Allow

PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}"
cd "$PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0

echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ"
echo "рҹ”Қ END-OF-TURN QUALITY CHECK"
echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ"

# 1. TypeScript check
TS_CHANGED=false
if git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then
  TS_CHANGED=true
fi
if git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then
  TS_CHANGED=true
fi

if [ "$TS_CHANGED" = true ]; then
  if [ -f "package.json" ] && grep -q '"typecheck"' package.json 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "рҹ“қ TypeScript files changed - running typecheck..."
    if ! bun run typecheck 2>&1 | head -20; then
      echo "" >&2
      echo "вқҢ TYPECHECK FAILED" >&2
      echo "Fix TypeScript errors before continuing." >&2
      exit 2
    fi
    echo "вң… Typecheck passed"
  fi
fi

# 2. Rust check
RS_CHANGED=false
if git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then
  RS_CHANGED=true
fi
if git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.rs$'; then
  RS_CHANGED=true
fi

if [ "$RS_CHANGED" = true ]; then
  if [ -f "src-tauri/Cargo.toml" ]; then
    echo "рҹҰҖ Rust files changed - running cargo check..."
    if ! (cd src-tauri && cargo check 2>&1 | head -20); then
      echo "" >&2
      echo "вқҢ CARGO CHECK FAILED" >&2
      echo "Fix Rust errors before continuing." >&2
      exit 2
    fi
    echo "вң… Cargo check passed"
  fi
fi

# 3. Harness file validation
WARNINGS=0

if [ ! -f ".harness/features.json" ]; then
  echo "вҡ пёҸ  .harness/features.json not found" >&2
  WARNINGS=$((WARNINGS + 1))
else
  TOTAL=$(jq 'length' .harness/features.json 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  PASSED=$(jq '[.[] | select(.passes == true)] | length' .harness/features.json 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  echo "рҹ“Ҡ Features: $PASSED/$TOTAL passed"
fi

# Check if progress.txt was modified this session
if [ -f ".harness/progress.txt" ]; then
  MODIFIED=$(git status --porcelain .harness/progress.txt 2>/dev/null | grep -c "M " || echo "0")
  if [ "$MODIFIED" -eq 0 ]; then
    LAST_MOD=$(stat -f "%Sm" -t "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" .harness/progress.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
    echo "вҡ пёҸ  REMINDER: progress.txt not modified (last: $LAST_MOD)" >&2
    echo "   Consider updating with session summary before stopping" >&2
    WARNINGS=$((WARNINGS + 1))
  else
    echo "вң… Progress: .harness/progress.txt updated this session"
  fi
else
  echo "вҡ пёҸ  .harness/progress.txt not found - update progress log" >&2
  WARNINGS=$((WARNINGS + 1))
fi

# 4. Uncommitted changes check
if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  UNCOMMITTED=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
  if [ "$UNCOMMITTED" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo ""
    echo "вҡ пёҸ  WARNING: $UNCOMMITTED uncommitted file(s)"
    git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -5 | sed 's/^/   /'
    if [ "$UNCOMMITTED" -gt 5 ]; then
      echo "   ... and $((UNCOMMITTED - 5)) more"
    fi
    WARNINGS=$((WARNINGS + 1))
  else
    echo "вң… Git: Working tree clean"
  fi
fi

# Summary
echo ""
echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ"
if [ "$WARNINGS" -gt 0 ]; then
  echo "вҡ пёҸ  END-OF-TURN: $WARNINGS warning(s)"
  echo "   Consider addressing before stopping"
else
  echo "вң… ALL CHECKS PASSED"
  echo "   Codebase is production-ready"
fi
echo "в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ"

exit 0
